ddls:
CREATE TABLE "applications" (
  "app_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application */,
  "app_name" TEXT /* Name of the application */,
  "alternative_name" TEXT /* Alternative name for the application */,
  "full_description" TEXT /* Full description of the application */,
  "current_status" TEXT /* Current status of the application (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  "data_center_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data center where the application is hosted */,
  "cloud_environment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cloud environment where the application is hosted */,
  "business_unit" TEXT /* Business unit the application belongs to */,
  "technical_owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the technical owner of the application */,
  "last_review_date" TEXT /* Date of the last review */,
  "next_review_date" TEXT /* Date of the next review */,
  "criticality" TEXT /* Criticality of the application (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the application was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("app_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_cloud_environment_id FOREIGN KEY ("cloud_environment_id") REFERENCES cloud_environments ("cloud_environment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_technical_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("technical_owner_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_data_center_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_center_id") REFERENCES data_centers ("data_center_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "strategies" (
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each strategy */,
  "strategy_name" TEXT /* Name of the strategy */,
  "alternative_name" TEXT /* Alternative name for the strategy */,
  "description" TEXT /* Full description of the strategy */,
  "investment_level" TEXT /* Level of investment required (e.g., Small, Medium, Large) */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* Risk level associated with the strategy (e.g., Low, Medium, High) */,
  "approval_required" INTEGER /* Indicates if approval is required before applying the strategy */,
  "estimated_time" TEXT /* Estimated time required to complete the strategy */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the strategy was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("strategy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "application_strategies" (
  "app_strategy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application-strategy relationship */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application */,
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the strategy */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the strategy application (e.g., Planned, In Progress, Completed) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the strategy was started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the strategy was completed */,
  "investment_amount" REAL /* Amount of investment made for the strategy */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the strategy */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date the strategy was approved */,
  "completed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who completed the strategy */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the application-strategy relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("app_strategy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_application_strategies_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES applications ("app_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_application_strategies_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_application_strategies_completed_by FOREIGN KEY ("completed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_application_strategies_strategy_id FOREIGN KEY ("strategy_id") REFERENCES strategies ("strategy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_centers" (
  "data_center_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data center */,
  "data_center_name" TEXT /* Name of the data center */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the data center */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the data center */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager of the data center */,
  "capacity" TEXT /* Capacity of the data center */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data center was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_center_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_centers_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cloud_environments" (
  "cloud_environment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cloud environment */,
  "cloud_environment_name" TEXT /* Name of the cloud environment */,
  "provider" TEXT /* Provider of the cloud environment (e.g., AWS, Azure) */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the cloud environment is located */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the cloud environment */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager of the cloud environment */,
  "capacity" TEXT /* Capacity of the cloud environment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the cloud environment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cloud_environment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cloud_environments_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "application_dependencies" (
  "dependency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application dependency */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application that depends on another application */,
  "dependent_app_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application being depended on */,
  "dependency_type" TEXT /* Type of dependency (e.g., Data, Service) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dependency */,
  "criticality" TEXT /* Criticality of the dependency (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dependency was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dependency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_application_dependencies_dependent_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("dependent_app_id") REFERENCES applications ("app_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_application_dependencies_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES applications ("app_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., IT Manager, Application Owner, Business Leader) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "application_owners" (
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application owner relationship */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the application */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the user started owning the application */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the user stopped owning the application */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the ownership was assigned */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("owner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_application_owners_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_application_owners_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES applications ("app_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "application_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical change */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., Status Change, Strategy Application) */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the change was made */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the historical change was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_application_history_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES applications ("app_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_application_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investment_logs" (
  "investment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investment log */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application */,
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the strategy */,
  "investment_date" TEXT /* Date the investment was made */,
  "investment_amount" REAL /* Amount of the investment */,
  "investment_description" TEXT /* Description of the investment */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the investment */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date the investment was approved */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the investment log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("investment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investment_logs_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investment_logs_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES applications ("app_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investment_logs_strategy_id FOREIGN KEY ("strategy_id") REFERENCES strategies ("strategy_id")
)
